summary: Comprehensive testing of IRS Forms 1094-C and 1095-C feature. All 42 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features including form generation, tab navigation, employee list, search, expandable monthly details, and PDF download buttons.
passed_tests: IRS Forms page loads at /irs-forms with summary cards
Summary cards show correct data: 2 FT employees, ALE Status (Not ALE), 2 1095-C forms required
Tab navigation between Overview, Form 1094-C, and Forms 1095-C works correctly
Generate All Forms button generates both 1094-C and 1095-C forms
Form 1094-C displays Part I (ALE Member Info), Part II (ALE Member Details), Part III (Monthly Data)
Form 1094-C shows correct employer info: Test Corp, EIN 12-3456789, Address 123 Main St
Form 1094-C Part III shows 12 months of data with FT/Total employee counts
Forms 1095-C tab shows 2 employee forms (Alice Johnson, Bob Martinez)
Employee search in 1095-C tab filters correctly
1095-C employee list shows expandable monthly details
1095-C expanded view shows Part II monthly data (Line 14, Line 15, Line 16)
1095-C expanded view shows Part III Covered Individuals for enrolled employees
PDF download buttons present for both 1094-C and 1095-C forms
IRS code logic: Alice (enrolled) has Line 14=1A, Line 16=2C
IRS code logic: Bob (not enrolled) has Line 14=1B, Line 16=2F
Navigation link 'IRS Forms' shows in sidebar
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/summary/{employer_id}/{tax_year} returns correct summary
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1094c/{employer_id}/{tax_year} generates Form 1094-C
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1095c/{employer_id}/{tax_year} generates batch 1095-C forms
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1095c/{employer_id}/{tax_year}/{employee_id} generates single 1095-C
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1094c/{employer_id}/{tax_year}/pdf returns valid PDF
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1095c/{employer_id}/{tax_year}/{employee_id}/pdf returns valid PDF
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/codes returns Line 14 and Line 16 code references
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Invalid employer_id returns 404
Backend: Invalid employee_id returns 404

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all IRS Forms UI components and integrations working)

seed_data_creation: Test employer 'Test Corp' with 2 employees (Alice Johnson - enrolled, Bob Martinez - not enrolled) used for testing. Data was pre-created by main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IRS Forms feature fully tested and working. All endpoints generate correct IRS form data. Line 14 codes correctly determine offer type (1A for qualifying offer, 1B for employee-only). Line 16 codes correctly determine safe harbor (2C for enrolled, 2F for W-2 safe harbor). PDF generation works for both 1094-C and 1095-C forms. Frontend displays all form data correctly with expandable monthly details.

bob_martinez.line14: 1B (MEC providing MV offered to employee only)
